title: Restore ability to select multiple x-axis column types for bar chart widget

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a bar chart widget on my Monday dashboard that displays selected x-axis data for boards and groups simultaneously.

In other words, some bars on the chart reflect labels/data from an entire board and others from groups on certain boards.

I cannot replicate this configuration when adding new bar chart widgets. Monday support informed me that the feature is no longer available (ticket id:#3278737).

Now, the bar chart widget only supports displaying x-axis data from a single column type.

My request is for the ability to mix and match what is displayed to be restored.

I believe my issue is similar to this user’s, except his issue was with the y-axis: Selecting Multiple Y Axis Columns on a Bar Chart Daskboard

Screenshots:

docs.google.com

Issue (updated 3/16)

This Slide is private
